name: Memory Decay
description: Human-like memory with gradual decay (Ebbinghaus curve), recall reinforcement, and associative activation via knowledge graph

halfLifeDays.description: Half-life in days for temporal decay. After this many days, an unrecalled memory's recency drops to ~50%. Matches OpenClaw SDK temporal-decay model.

activationThreshold.description: Memories with activation below this are excluded from results

autoRateImportance.description: Use LLM to rate importance of unrated memories on first recall

ontologyPath.description: Path to ontology graph file for spreading activation
